description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named report-built-images that runs in the report stage using the Docker image defined by the ALPINE_IMAGE variable. The job should execute the following shell commands: set -- "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}"/*-built-image.txt; while [ "$#" -gt 0 ] && [ ! -f "$1" ]; do shift; done; if [ -f "$1" ]; then cat *-built-image.txt > all-built-images.txt; cat all-built-images.txt; else echo "No images built"; fi. It should collect the file all-built-images.txt as an artifact, keep it for 90 days, and store it at the path all-built-images.txt. No additional services, caches, or deployment rules are required.
